description_long: This is a single-story bungalow situated on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading to an attached garage. The structure features a combination of light-colored exterior walls and a dark, gabled roof with multiple rooflines, suggesting a spacious interior layout. The front facade includes a prominent entryway and a set of windows, while the garage is seamlessly integrated into the main building. The surrounding lawn is expansive, with the house set back from the street, providing ample yard space. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to a modern suburban aesthetic. The overall design is practical and inviting, typical of North American suburban neighborhoods.
description: A light-colored, single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, attached garage, and asymmetrical window arrangement, set on a large grassy lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage, driveway, and a set of front-facing windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the garage extension, and the driveway connecting to the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the full expanse of the backyard.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the intersection of rooflines, rear windows, and the side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
